citation: 2025 NTD Monthly and Weekly Reference Policy Manual, Monthly Ridership Reporting (Form MR-20), pp. 32-33 — verified 2026-07-11 (REGULATORY_TRACKER.md, 'Verified — Monthly Ridership form MR-20')
banner: NOT REPORTABLE — preview package only. Every figure below is governed by the caveats enumerated in 'caveats'; nothing in this package may be submitted to the NTD. Generated from computed.metric_values with full provenance (metric_value_id, calc_version, certification_status, flags, coverage) per cell.

caveats.text: One or more figures come from 0.x (pre-verification) calc versions: definitions are verified against the NTD manuals but the implementations carry documented divergences (REGULATORY_TRACKER.md) — no 0.x figure is reportable.
One or more figures consumed SIMULATED source records (e.g. source='tides_simulated'): a certifiable figure containing simulated records is a contradiction (handoff-0005 simulated-data rule).
One or more figures carry certification_status 'uncertified': no human attestation exists for them (cert.certifications).

VOMS is the voms_v0 day-level proxy: the maximum over service days (UTC) of distinct vehicles observed in revenue service — an UPPER-BOUND proxy for the p. 33 'maximum service requirement' (schedule-peak simultaneity); the atypical-day exclusion is NOT implemented (agency calendar policy pending); rail passenger-car counting pending D2 (tracker, calc voms_v0 divergences a/b/c).
One or more VOMS figures observed fewer days than the period contains (voms_partial_observation warning): the reported maximum may understate the month's true VOMS.
One or more cells are missing (value null with a reason): the metric was not computed for that scope, or its run was blocked by dq findings — a missing figure is reported as missing, never invented.
Layover/recovery time in VRH — CLOSED by vrh_v0 0.3.0/0.4.0 block-aware layover inclusion (tracker); retained here because the closure is calc-version-specific.

Rail passenger-car measure: rail VRM/VRH/VOMS count passenger cars (a 4-car train x 1 mi = 4 car-miles); GTFS-RT carries one vehicle per trainset. Rail modes are flagged non-reportable pending consist data.
Revenue-service proxy: trip_id assignment stands in for 'in revenue service'; agency practice varies — per-agency confirmation required.
Measurement fidelity: position-derived haversine distance chord-cuts curves; validate against odometer/shape distance before reportability.
Demand-response definition (first pick-up to last drop-off) is not implemented; DR is out of scope for the fixed-route calcs.
Excluded activities (charter/school/training/maintenance) are excluded only insofar as they carry no trip_id (covered by the D3 proxy caveat).

voms.reason: No computed.metric_values row for metric 'voms' scope 'mode:subway' in period [2026-06-01, 2026-07-01): the metric was not computed for this scope, or its run was blocked (see dq.issues). A missing figure is reported as missing, never invented.
